name: cotidie
description: Cotidie's custom Codex skills: PR writing, iteration roadmaps, UML class diagrams, CLI user testing, slide design extraction and React scaffolding.

interface.shortDescription: Custom Codex workflows for PR writing, iteration roadmaps, UML class diagrams, CLI user testing, slide design extraction and React scaffolding.
interface.longDescription: Cotidie's Codex plugin bundles reusable workflow skills for drafting pull request text, planning vertical user-testable iterations, creating or modifying UML class diagrams as draw.io files, driving built programs through the terminal as a real user to surface bugs, reverse-engineering reference slides into a reusable DESIGN.md visual design system and scaffolding or refactoring React apps.
capabilities: Draft PR and MR titles and bodies
Create UML class diagrams as draw.io files
Modify existing UML class diagrams against code
Drive built programs as a real user and report findings
Reverse-engineer reference slides into a reusable DESIGN.md design system
Scaffold or refactor React apps with bundled conventions
